data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate whether the setup/teardown time is included or added, as specified in the requirement. However, the evidence provided does not explicitly confirm that this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions that setup starts at 2pm and cleanup is by midnight, but it does not clarify if this time is included in the booking duration or if it is an additional time, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No explicit confirmation that setup/teardown time is included or added to the booking duration.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add explicit confirmation of setup/teardown time handling
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify if setup/teardown time is included in the booking duration.
